_comment: Canvas File ID to Local File Path Mapping — PHYS-2325 University Physics I, TSTC Fall 2026
_description: Maps Canvas LMS file IDs to local file paths under files/. After uploading an image to Canvas, find its file ID in the URL (e.g., .../files/12345678) and add it here. The local path is relative to the files/ directory.
_instructions: Format: 'CanvasFileID': 'M{N}/M{N}L{N}/filename.ext'  —  IDs are filled in after Canvas upload. Rows marked PENDING need their Canvas ID added once the file is uploaded to the course.
_M1L1_pending: PENDING — upload M1/M1L1/Mars_Climate_Orbiter_2.jpg to Canvas Files then replace this comment key with the Canvas file ID
_M1L2_pending: PENDING — upload M1/M1L2/Speedometer.jpg to Canvas Files then replace REPLACE_M1L2 key with the Canvas file ID
_M1L3_pending: PENDING — upload M1/M1L3/Comair_5191_crash_site_3.jpg to Canvas Files then replace REPLACE_M1L3 key with the Canvas file ID
_M1L4_pending: PENDING — upload M1/M1L4/Car-highway-driver.jpg to Canvas Files then replace REPLACE_M1L4 key with the Canvas file ID
_M1L5_pending: PENDING — upload M1/M1L5/Firefly An apple falling from a tree to demonstrate the physics concept of free fall 14419.jpg to Canvas Files then replace REPLACE_M1L5 key with the Canvas file ID
REPLACE_M1L5: M1/M1L5/Firefly An apple falling from a tree to demonstrate the physics concept of free fall 14419.jpg
_M1L6_pending: PENDING — upload M1/M1L6/Velocity_Time_physics_graph.svg.png to Canvas Files then replace REPLACE_M1L6 key with the Canvas file ID
